scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @prism/server" "npm run dev -w @prism/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @prism/shared && npm run build -w @prism/server && npm run build -w @prism/web
scripts.tauri:dev: concurrently -n server,tauri -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @prism/server" "tauri dev"
scripts.tauri:build: npm run build -w @prism/shared && npm run build -w @prism/server && tauri build
